calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment-Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant EGT Enterprise, inc., a corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:44 a.m., adjourning at 10:45 a.m. and reconvening at 11:06 a.m.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company, a corporation.
Tammy Tedesco, Senior Legal Administrator and Custodian of Records for plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Klavdianos and Ms. Tedesco appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant EGT Enterprise, Inc., a corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money Due for Unpaid Insurance Premiums was filed on October 30, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant EGT Enterprise, Inc. occurred on February 4, 2021, and was effectuated on February 15, 2021.
Default as to defendant EGT Enterprise, Inc. was entered on July 22, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 13, 2021.

Plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Copy of defendant's Insurance Policy from plaintiff........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Copy of "Audit" completed 09/17/2019.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Invoice to defendant in the amount of $78,059.00...........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company, a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant EGT Enterprise, Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,059.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,319.74.
Costs - $646.50.

Total - $92,025.24.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:16 a.m.
